column1: Import into Google Sheets. Use as a reference for all presentations documents and web assets.

column7: Used for H1–H5 · Titles · CTAs · Stats callouts
Used for all body copy · Labels · Captions · UI text
Code snippets only · Not for general use

column8: All slide body copy and bullets

column2: ALL text is left-aligned in all media. Center ONLY web hero H1 and single stat callouts.
Use bold text to highlight key ideas — never italic for emphasis.
Italic is acceptable for quotes only — not for general emphasis
Use Electric Blue #0266F7 to emphasize key points in copy
Always use Navy #061947 for headlines on white or light backgrounds
Use white text only on Navy or gradient backgrounds
If Poppins or Inter cannot load the fallback is Arial — ensure decks still look clean
